title: Moroccan Date Crumble
description: A French-inspired dessert that combines the sweetness of dates with the crunch of a buttery crumble topping.
instructions: Arrange the dates in the prepared dish.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, granulated sugar, and brown sugar. Add the softened butter and mix until a crumbly mixture forms.
Add the crumbs from the baguette and cinnamon to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Evenly distribute the crumble topping over the dates.
Bake for 30-35 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, topped with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream if desired.
